case_title: ALFREDO CAMPOS VS. GERARDO DELGADO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ALFREDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELGADO, GERARDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1827 ALEMANY BLVD., SAN FRANCISCO CA 94112, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANT/TENANTS.**
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, GERARDO
RENT DEPOSIT, TRAN # R1612703R011, TAG # 030862 STAY UNTIL JUL 10, 12 AT 5:00PM DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT DELGADO, GERARDO MARTINEZ, EDDY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, GERARDO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ALFREDO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, GERARDO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, ALFREDO SERVED JUN-05-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EDDY

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, EDDY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
